PHASE:        Phase 7 Feature Update — Super Admin Panel backlog item 3
              (platformUser cross-tenant tRPC router) SHIPPED to
              origin/main. Tier 2 backend-only addition — separate
              router file wired as new top-level `platformUser`

              procedures. Zero breaking change to existing callers.

LAST_DONE:    Created apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/platformUser.ts
              (281L) with 5 procedures, ALL using
              platformAdminProcedure + platformPrisma (bypasses tenant
              L1 by design — gated on super_admin role + empty
              ctx.tenantId per require-platform-admin middleware):

                list({ tenantId?, role?, isActive?, search?, cursor?, limit })
                  Cross-tenant or scoped (null=super_admins only,
                  string=specific tenant, undefined=all). Cursor
                  pagination, include tenant {name,slug}.
                create({ email, fullName, role, tenantId, languagePreference })
                  Enforces super_admin↔null tenantId invariant.
                  Verifies tenant exists+active. Global email
                  uniqueness. crypto.randomBytes(16) temp pwd,
                  bcrypt cost 12. Returns { user, tempPassword }.
                  Audit: PLATFORM:CREATE_USER.
                updateRole({ id, role })
                  Re-enforces invariant. securityVersion increment.
                  Audit: PLATFORM:UPDATE_USER_ROLE (before+after).
                deactivate({ id })
                  Idempotent (skips update + audit if already
                  inactive). securityVersion increment on change.
                  Audit: PLATFORM:DEACTIVATE_USER.
                resetPassword({ id })
                  New temp pwd + bcrypt hash + securityVersion
                  increment. Audit: PLATFORM:RESET_USER_PASSWORD
                  (no hash/pwd in changesJson).

              Test suite:
                apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/__tests__/platformUser.test.ts
                (348L, 16 cases across 6 describes — auth gate ×2,
                list ×4, create ×5, updateRole ×2, deactivate ×2,
                resetPassword ×1). Uses partial<T> matcher helper
                (same pattern as platform.test.ts) for typed
                objectContaining assertions.

              Wired in apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/index.ts as
              `platformUser: platformUserRouter` right after
              `platform: platformRouter`. Frontend can call
              trpc.platformUser.list / .create / .updateRole /
              .deactivate / .resetPassword.
